task_completion.description: Folders 'Triage/Critical' and 'Triage/Warning' are created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email client's folder pane (usually on the left side). Verify that folders named 'Triage/Critical' and 'Triage/Warning' exist.

task_completion.description: Emails with critical keywords are moved to the 'Triage/Critical' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Triage/Critical' folder. Verify if any emails with subjects containing 'error', 'fail', 'failure', or 'fatal' are present. (Note: This may be empty if the agent correctly identified that no such emails exist).

task_completion.description: Emails with warning keywords are moved to the 'Triage/Warning' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Triage/Warning' folder. Verify if any emails with subjects containing 'check', 'review', or 'warning' are present. (Note: This may be empty if the agent correctly identified that no such emails exist).

task_completion.description: A reply is sent to a sender of a Critical email with the required acknowledgment text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a drafted or sent email replying to a critical email. The body must contain the exact text: 'Acknowledged, investigating now.'

task_completion.description: A 'Shift Handover Summary' email is sent to sre-leads@company.com reporting the counts of categorized emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a drafted or sent email with the subject 'Shift Handover Summary' addressed to 'sre-leads@company.com'. The body must contain the format 'Critical Issues: [Number]' and 'Warnings: [Number]'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with a GUI email client (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution, or webmail) rather than using terminal commands or text editors to manipulate mail files.

integrity.description: The acknowledgment and summary emails were genuinely composed in the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the emails are visible in the email client's composer window or 'Sent' folder, rather than being injected via scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing commands that directly modify maildir/mbox files or send emails via CLI tools like 'sendmail' or 'mail'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Critical keywords are 'error', 'fail', 'failure', 'fatal'. Warning keywords are 'check', 'review', 'warning'. The summary report recipient is 'sre-leads@company.com'. Note: The provided inbox contains 50 sample emails, none of which contain the required keywords in their subjects. It is impossible to find and move 5 relevant emails. The agent may correctly report 0 counts in the summary email.
